_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.491), OP-K-004 (OP, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.643). Shared vocabulary: [design, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [processes, thinking] vs WIDAI-only terms [approaches, construction, criteria, development, evaluation, gate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.939, R=0.877). P exceeds R by 0.062 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of design thinking processes." and "Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype de" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 < STS 0.643 (gap -0.064). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [processes, thinking] and [approaches, construction, criteria] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [design, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [processes, thinking]. WIDAI-only: [approaches, construction, criteria, development, evaluation, gate].
